## 2024-05-19 - [Test-Compatible Numpy Array Slicing]
**Learning:** When writing vectorized code to order predictions array using column indices (`p[col_indices]`), tests mocking numpy returns will fail with `TypeError: list indices must be integers or slices, not list` because the mock returns standard Python lists instead of numpy arrays.
**Action:** Use list comprehensions like `[p[i] for i in col_indices]` when indexing arrays generated by mocked objects to maintain compatibility between real execution (numpy arrays) and mocked test environments (standard lists), without having to heavily complicate the test setup.
